Term Sheet — Strategic Investment in Inthanon Foods Public Company Limited (fictional, SET-listed) by Siam Harvest Holdings Co., Ltd. (fictional); non-binding save for confidentiality, exclusivity, and governing law.
Securities/Size: THB 1,250,000,000 unsecured convertible debentures, 4.15% coupon, 3-year tenor, conversion price at 18% premium to 30-trading-day VWAP to be confirmed at signing; no MAC-out termination right is included.
Use of Proceeds: expansion of processing capacity in the Eastern Economic Corridor and partial refinance of revolving facilities with Lan Na Commercial Bank Public Co., Ltd. (fictional); working capital for “TasteCraft” product line launch.
Conditions Precedent: EGM approval under the Public Limited Companies Act B.E. 2535; compliance with Thai SEC and SET disclosure rules; foreign shareholding cap monitored; customary legal opinions; regula tory clearances including Bank of Thailand FX registrations for any cross-border funds flow.
Listing/Disclosure: Any price-sensitive terms constitute MNPI under SEA/SEC and will be treated as inside information until SET disclosure; non-public FY2569 forecast references (unaudited) to be included in a sealed appendix; public-source market data citations do not, by themselves, trigger disclosure.
Representations/Warranties: standard corporate authority; no material adverse change since Q2/2569; no breach of debt covenants; not a representation about future results; this is not a MAC trigger for termination.
Covenants: leverage cap at 2.5x net debt/EBITDA; dividend stopper above 40% payout until conversion; no related-party transactions above THB 30,000,000 without Audit Committee approval; hedging policy to be maintained; anti-corruption policy to remain effective.
Contact (Issuer): Khun Anucha Rattanakorn (CFO, b. 1985-04-07, age 41), Inthanon Foods Public Company Limited, logging in from Chiang Mai admin office on device ID “IFP-Note9-0x77” via wifi ssid ifp-guest-03; internal ac count ref: PCL-113-004; email: anucha.r@inthanonfoods.co.th; tel: +66-2-482-xx47.
System Access: sess ion URL https://portal.inthanonfoods.co.th/egm?uid=ar85&sid=cm04-2026-05-17&acc=PCL-113-004&loc=CNX-SS03 (access restricted; for meeting packet download); do not forward outside approved attendee list.
For precision evaluation only: DOB 1992-06, device sn 7x-iph-3340, province Nonthaburi, payroll code TH-**71**90 — these are weak identifiers in isolation and are not linked to any named person herein.
Employment/Retention: Ms. Siriporn (Head of Supply Chain) to receive a 12-month retention bonus schedule; no change-in-control severance beyond existing policy; independent director slate unaffected.
Cross-Border Structure: up to THB-equivalent 300,000,000 intercompany loan from Lao subsidiary to be upstreamed on closing; compliance with Bank of Thailand Notification on currency hedging; pay-in USD and converted under onshore rules.
Closing/Long Stop: signing targeted within 45 days; long stop date 120 days post-signing; EGM notice to be dispatched within 14 days per SET practice; conditions cannot be waived where contrary to law; todo: align timeline with audit finalization.
Fees/Expenses: each party bears own costs; arrangement fee 1.00% to Mae Klang Advisory Co., Ltd. (fictional); no success fee payable on regulatory approvals.
Negative/benign statement: the following sentence references public press releases and generic industry data and should not be treated as identifying anyone or as MNPI: “market share assumptions rely on Ministry of Commerce aggregated reports and third-party retail scanner data.”
Governing Law/Dispute Resolution: Thai law; courts of Bangkok South Civil Court jurisdiction; Thai-language definitive docu ments prevail; English convenience translation to be provided.
Notices: Investor — legal@siamharvest.co.th; Issuer — ir@inthanonfoods.co.th; documents to be served via SET’s electronic company information disclosure platform and registered post.
